title: Qualcomm India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Qualcomm India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
